creator: truckman@FreeBSD.org
text:
The print/freetype-tools and print/psutils-letter ports
	both attempt to install /usr/local/bin/getafm.  If using pkgng
	this gets detected when the installation of the second of these
	two ports is registered, though this is too late becase the
	second port has already spammed the copy of getafm installed
	by the first port.

===>   Registering installation for psutils-letter-1.17_2^M
Installing psutils-letter-1.17_2...pkg: psutils-letter-1.17_2 conflicts with fre
etype-tools-1.3.1_9 (installs files into the same place).  Problematic file: /us
r/local/bin/getafm

Fix: 

At a minimum, the makefiles for these two ports should flag
	them as conflicting.

	It would be better to actually fix the conflict so that both
	ports can be installed on the same system.
How-To-Repeat: 	Attempt to install both ports.
